9:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Python SDK"}]
a:["$","p",null,{"children":"The primary interface. v2.3 supports multi-agent identity, tiered degradation, veracity signals, and cross-provider importers."}]
b:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"agent-42\", author_id=\"alice\", author_type=\"human\")\n\n# Store with veracity confidence\nmem.remember(\"PostgreSQL migration completed.\", veracity=\"stated\")\n\n# Multi-agent channel recall\nresults = mem.recall(\"migration status\", channel_id=\"team-db\")\n\n# Tiered degradation runs automatically\nmem.sleep()  # consolidates + degrades old memories\n"}]}]
c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Hermes Plugin"}]
d:["$","p",null,{"children":["First-class Hermes integration with 17 tools: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_remember"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_recall"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_stats"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_sleep"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_invalidate"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_triple_add"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_triple_query"}],", and more."]}]
